chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-4394 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing on CMA No. 20268/25. (stay) 2. For hearing of main case 29.01.2026. Mr. Salman Yousuf, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Yaqoob, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Sarfaraz Ali Metlo, Advocate for the Respondents. Mr. Asif Ali Siyal, Advocate for Respondent No.2. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. --------------- Learned counsel appearing for the Petitioner and Department jointly submit that the controversy at hand is akin to C.P No. D- 3128/2021 and connected cases, which were disposed of through an Order dated 13.09.2023, and seek disposal of this Petition accordingly. So ordered. The Petition stands disposed of in light of the aforementioned order, with the impugned demand (Annexure “P-2” at Page 37) being set aside leaving the Respondents at liberty to issue a Show Cause Notice to the Petitioner, whereafter the ensuing proceedings may be taken to their logical conclusion in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz ps.
